recommendations.title: Arctic Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: A massive influx of glacial melting triggers a new ice age in the Northern Hemisphere, forcing a family to make their way across the ice-covered landscape before they are frozen out for good.

recommendations.title: Captain America: Civil War
recommendations.overview: Following the events of Age of Ultron, the collective governments of the world pass an act designed to regulate all superhuman activity. This polarizes opinion amongst the Avengers, causing two factions to side with Iron Man or Captain America, which

recommendations.title: Arctic Blast
recommendations.overview: When a solar eclipse sends a colossal blast of super chilled air towards the earth, it then sets off a catastrophic chain of events that threatens to engulf the world in ice and begin a new Ice Age.

recommendations.title: A Part of You
recommendations.overview: A teenager struggles to pick up the pieces of her shattered world in this emotional and bittersweet coming-of-age drama about those who are left behind.

recommendations.title: Hundreds of Beavers
recommendations.overview: In the 19th century, a drunken applejack salesman must go from zero to hero and become North America's greatest fur trapper by defeating hundreds of beavers.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Action, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: The Turtles and the Shredder battle once again, this time for the last cannister of the ooze that created the Turtles, which Shredder wants to create an army of new mutants. Meanwhile Splinter is coming... to a decision.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: The Colony
recommendations.overview: Forced underground by the next ice age, a struggling outpost of survivors must fight to preserve humanity against a threat even more savage than nature.

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.
